Migration completed.

Done:
- Moved all Pages Router routes to App Router
- Converted:
  - `pages/index.js` → `app/page.tsx`
  - `pages/blog/index.js` → `app/blog/page.tsx`
  - `pages/blog/[id].js` → `app/blog/[id]/page.tsx`
  - `pages/api/posts/index.js` → `app/api/posts/route.ts`
  - `pages/api/posts/[id].js` → `app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts`
  - `pages/404.js` → `app/not-found.tsx`
  - `pages/_error.js` → `app/error.tsx`
  - `pages/_app.js` → `app/layout.tsx`
  - `pages/_document.js` → `app/layout.tsx` metadata/head handling
- Added TypeScript types
- Replaced Pages Router APIs with App Router equivalents:
  - `getServerSideProps` → server component + `headers()`
  - `getStaticProps`/`getStaticPaths` → `generateStaticParams` + route caching/revalidation
  - `next/router` → `next/navigation`
  - `next/head` → `metadata`
  - API routes → Route Handlers
- Removed the `pages` directory entirely

Build:
- `npm run build` ✅ succeeded
